mentions.note: Eccentric specialty retailer uniting economic groups; caters to families avoiding high prices; Cramer blessing to buy.
Spectacular turnaround under CEO Winnie Park; beat guidance on SSS growth (15.4% vs 14.5%), EPS ($4.31 vs $4.00), and full-year guidance; stock tripled in 12 months with more room to run.
Gets absolutely slaughtered despite selling 100% discretionary goods and being the strong performer of discount retail group; irrational selling on war fears.
Well off highs now and down 25 points; Cramer likes it very much given consistency and price points for discretionary products; would buy ahead of quarter
Former market darling now cautious on consumer environment; no guidance raise despite expectations; stock fell 14% today signaling investor re-assessment.
